blocker: No safe upstream Geneformer perturbation API is implemented in this repository. Real Geneformer-level perturbation must run in a controlled cloud/GPU environment that perturbs raw or tokenized gene input before embedding extraction, recomputes embeddings, and then applies the fixed downstream classifier without refitting.
claim_boundary: Geneformer-level perturbation plausibility analysis is hypothesis-generating only. It does not constitute external validation, clinical validation, causal validation, or evidence of clinical diagnostic utility.
